[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01101111 6
1 11110110 6
2 10100110 4
3 11001010 4
4 01101001 4
5 11111110 7
6 11111101 7
7 01000100 2

01 10 10000110 3
12 21 11111110 7 match 5
23 32 10100011 4
34 43 10010111 5
45 54 00000011 2
56 65 10111001 5
67 76 11010110 5
70 07 00100000 1

13 31 01011101 5
24 42 00110100 3
35 53 10010100 3
46 64 10111010 5
57 75 01101111 6 match 0
60 06 11110110 6 match 1
71 17 10100110 4 match 2

03 30 11011011 6
14 41 11001010 4 match 3
25 52 00110111 5
36 63 00101101 4
47 74 01101100 4
50 05 01001111 5
61 16 01110000 3
72 27 01011000 3

37 73 11111011 7
